authors: Maxwell Foxman School of Journalism and Communication
raw_title: Conceptualizing Fidelity: Reimagining Contemporary Visual Journalism’s Occupational Ideologies
title_en: Conceptualizing Fidelity: Reimagining Contemporary Visual Journalism’s Occupational Ideologies
title_zh: 概念化保真度：重新构想当代视觉新闻的职业意识形态
plain_summary_zh: 这篇论文探讨了当代视觉新闻中“保真度”的概念，重新思考了新闻工作者在视觉报道中的职业理念和价值观。
plain_summary_en: This paper explores the concept of 'fidelity' in contemporary visual journalism, rethinking the professional beliefs and values of journalists in visual reporting.
research_direction_zh: 研究视觉新闻中的职业意识形态和伦理框架，探讨保真度在新闻实践中的意义。
research_direction_en: Investigating occupational ideologies and ethical frameworks in visual journalism, exploring the significance of fidelity in journalistic practice.
